text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Phase 1: backend-core agent (T-001 to T-011)","description":"Upstream agent: DB schema, encryption, core services, Shopee adapter, OAuth controller, admin channels controller. 11 tasks. Must complete before Phase 2.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-12T15:23:55.597Z"}

PLAN_READY

Increment 0009-channel-sync-core created with spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md covering T-001 to T-011.

**Execution order**:
- Phase A: Prisma schema + CredentialEncryptionService (T-001, T-002)
- Phase B: ChannelConnectionService CRUD, SyncDispatcher, SyncExecutor (T-003, T-004, T-005)
- Phase C: ShopeeAdapter OAuth + fetchOrders (T-006, T-007)
- Phase D: OAuthController, OrderMapper, Order Upsert, AdminChannelsController (T-008-T-011)

**Key findings from codebase exploration**:
- `@nestjs/schedule` already in package.json deps
- Uses `prisma` singleton from `@shopvui/db` (not PrismaService injection)
- Tests use vitest with `vi.mock('@shopvui/db')` and manual service construction (no NestJS DI in tests)
- AdminGuard pattern: `@UseGuards(AdminGuard)` on controller class
- Order model already has `channel` field (String) + `externalOrderId` with `@@index([externalOrderId, channel])`
- Module wiring: ChannelsModule → AppModule, AdminChannelsModule → AdminModule

Awaiting PLAN_APPROVED to begin implementation.
{"type":"idle_notification","from":"backend-core","timestamp":"2026-03-12T15:26:07.861Z","idleReason":"available"}

CONTRACT_READY + COMPLETION

All 11 tasks (T-001 to T-011) are implemented and tested. **64 tests pass across 8 test files**, no regressions in existing tests.

## What was built

### Schema (T-001)
- `ChannelType` enum (SHOPEE, TIKTOK), `SyncStatus` enum (IDLE, RUNNING, SUCCESS, FAILED)
- `ChannelConnection` model with `@@unique([channel, shopId])`, encrypted token fields
- `SyncLog` model with cascade delete on connection, indexed by connectionId and startedAt
- `channelConnections` relation added to User model
- Migration SQL at `packages/db/prisma/migrations/20260312100000_add_channel_sync_models/`

### Services (T-002 to T-010)
- **CredentialEncryptionService** — AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt with CHANNEL_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var (7 tests)
- **ChannelConnectionService** — CRUD, encrypts tokens on create, never exposes tokens in DTOs (6 tests)
- **SyncDispatcherService** — `@Cron(EVERY_MINUTE)`, isDue() check, concurrency guard Set, triggerNow() (6 tests)
- **SyncExecutorService** — Orchestration with adapter registry, retry with exponential backoff, SyncLog writes (7 tests)
- **ShopeeAdapter** — OAuth URL, code exchange, token refresh, fetchOrders with pagination, HMAC-SHA256 signing (8 tests)
- **OAuthController + OAuthService** — State generation/validation, redirect flow, callback handling (7 tests)
- **OrderMapperService** — mapShopeeOrder, mapShopeeStatus (5 statuses + unknown), mapTikTokStatus (6 statuses + unknown) (17 tests)
- **Error classes** — RateLimitError, AuthExpiredError, NetworkError, MappingError with errorType + humanMessage

### Admin API (T-011)
- **AdminChannelsController** — GET /admin/channels, POST /:id/sync (202), PATCH /:id, DELETE /:id, GET /:id/logs (6 tests)
- **AdminChannelsService** — delegates to ChannelConnectionService + SyncDispatcher, paginated logs, interval validation (5-15 min)

### Module wiring
- `ChannelsModule` → imports ScheduleModule.forRoot(), registered in AppModule
- `AdminChannelsModule` → imports ChannelsModule, registered in AdminModule
- Adapter registry pattern: adapters registered in onModuleInit

## Files created/modified
- `packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma` — ChannelConnection, SyncLog models + enums
- `packages/db/src/index.ts` — new type exports
- `apps/api/src/channels/` — 10 new files (module, services, adapter, controller, tests)
- `apps/api/src/admin/channels/` — 4 new files (module, controller, service, test)
- `apps/api/src/app.module.ts` — ChannelsModule import
- `apps/api/src/admin/admin.module.ts` — AdminChannelsModule import
summary: All T-001 to T-011 complete, 64 tests passing

PLAN_READY

Increment: 0010-channel-sync-tiktok
Files: .specweave/increments/0010-channel-sync-tiktok/ (metadata.json, spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md)

## Summary

After reading all upstream contracts, I found that 4 of my 9 assigned tasks are already complete:
- **T-012**: Shopee status mapping - fully implemented with tests
- **T-013**: TikTok status mapping - fully implemented with tests  
- **T-018**: Admin GET endpoints - fully implemented with tests
- **T-021**: SyncLog error types - fully implemented with tests

Remaining work (4 tasks):
1. **T-016**: Add `mapTikTokOrder()` method to OrderMapperService (maps raw TikTok API response to ExternalOrder)
2. **T-014 + T-015**: Create TikTokAdapter implementing ChannelAdapter interface (OAuth URL, code exchange, token refresh, fetchOrders with pagination and rate-limit handling) - mirrors ShopeeAdapter pattern exactly
3. **T-017**: Register TikTokAdapter in ChannelsModule + write integration test
4. **T-022**: Create SyncLogCleanupService with @Cron daily job for 30-day retention

Implementation order: T-016 -> T-014/T-015 -> T-017 -> T-022
All follow TDD: tests first, then implementation.

Awaiting PLAN_APPROVED to begin.

PLAN_READY

Increment: 0011-channel-sync-frontend
Tasks: T-019 (Channel Settings Page), T-020 (Sync Logs View + Connect OAuth Flow)

## Plan Summary

### Existing Patterns Identified
- Next.js App Router with `(dashboard)` route group layout (Sidebar + Header)
- Client-side data fetching via `apiFetch()` from `@/lib/api`
- Reusable components: `DataTable`, `Pagination`, `StatusBadge`, `ChannelBadge`
- Tailwind CSS v4 styling, consistent button/input patterns
- Constants in `@/lib/constants.ts` (already has CHANNEL_COLORS for Shopee/TikTok)

### File Plan
```
apps/admin/src/app/(dashboard)/channels/
  page.tsx              — Main channel settings page (T-019)
  channel-card.tsx      — ChannelCard client component with sync/toggle/interval controls
  sync-logs-drawer.tsx  — Sync logs slide-over panel with DataTable (T-020)

apps/admin/src/components/sidebar.tsx — Add "Channels" nav item
```

### T-019: Channel Settings Page
- `page.tsx`: Fetches GET /admin/channels, renders channel cards for connected shops + "Connect" buttons for unconnected channels
- `channel-card.tsx`: Shows shop name, channel badge, sync status badge (SUCCESS=green, FAILED=red, RUNNING=yellow), relative last sync time, "Sync Now" button with loading spinner, toggle for syncEnabled, dropdown for interval (5/10/15 min), "Disconnect" with confirm, "View Logs" button

### T-020: Sync Logs + Connect Flow
- `sync-logs-drawer.tsx`: Slide-over panel using existing DataTable + Pagination. Columns: Time, Status, Fetched, Created, Updated, Duration, Error. Error rows show errorType chip + errorMessage
- Connect button: `<a href>` to `GET /channels/oauth/:channel` (server-side redirect)

### Testing
- Vitest + @testing-library/react + jsdom (existing setup)
- Mock `apiFetch` for all API calls
- Test file: `apps/admin/src/app/(dashboard)/channels/__tests__/channels.test.tsx`

Awaiting PLAN_APPROVED to begin implementation.

COMPLETION

Both tasks T-019 and T-020 are implemented and all 11 tests pass.

## Files Created/Modified

**New files:**
- `apps/admin/src/app/(dashboard)/channels/page.tsx` — Main channel settings page
- `apps/admin/src/app/(dashboard)/channels/channel-card.tsx` — ChannelCard component with sync/toggle/interval/disconnect controls
- `apps/admin/src/app/(dashboard)/channels/sync-logs-drawer.tsx` — Slide-over panel with paginated sync log table
- `apps/admin/src/app/(dashboard)/channels/__tests__/channels.test.tsx` — 11 unit tests

**Modified files:**
- `apps/admin/src/components/sidebar.tsx` — Added "Channels" nav item
- `apps/admin/vitest.config.ts` — Added `@/` path alias + excluded `e2e/` dir (was failing on playwright import)

## Test Results
```
 ✓ src/__tests__/dashboard-page.test.tsx (1 test)
 ✓ src/app/(dashboard)/channels/__tests__/channels.test.tsx (10 tests)
 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  11 passed (11)
```

## What was built

**T-019 - Channel Settings Page:**
- `/admin/channels` page showing Shopee and TikTok sections
- Connected shops render as ChannelCard with: shop name, channel badge, sync status badge (color-coded), relative last sync time
- "Sync Now" button with loading state -> POST /admin/channels/:id/sync
- Toggle switch for syncEnabled -> PATCH /admin/channels/:id
- Dropdown for interval (5/10/15 min) -> PATCH /admin/channels/:id
- "Disconnect" button with confirmation dialog -> DELETE /admin/channels/:id
- Unconnected channels show dashed card with "Connect" button

**T-020 - Sync Logs + Connect Flow:**
- SyncLogsDrawer slide-over panel using existing DataTable + Pagination
- Columns: Time, Status (color badges), Fetched, Created, Updated, Duration, Error
- Error rows show errorType chip (color-coded by type) + errorMessage text
- Connect buttons link to `GET /channels/oauth/:channel` for OAuth redirect
- "Connect Another Shop" button for channels with existing connections

All UI follows existing patterns (apiFetch, DataTable, StatusBadge/ChannelBadge, Tailwind styling).

COMPLETION

All backend-tiktok tasks are done. Test results: **43 tests passing across 5 test files** (0 failures in my scope).

## Files Created
- `apps/api/src/channels/adapters/tiktok.adapter.ts` - TikTokAdapter implementing ChannelAdapter (OAuth, token refresh, fetchOrders with pagination + rate-limit)
- `apps/api/src/channels/adapters/tiktok.adapter.spec.ts` - 14 tests (OAuth URL, exchangeCode, sign, refresh, fetchOrders with pagination/rate-limit/field mapping/missing fields)
- `apps/api/src/channels/sync/sync-log-cleanup.service.ts` - @Cron daily midnight job, deletes SyncLog entries older than 30 days
- `apps/api/src/channels/sync/sync-log-cleanup.service.spec.ts` - 3 tests
- `apps/api/src/channels/sync/tiktok-sync.integration.spec.ts` - 4 tests (full sync, resync update, success log, rate-limit retry)

## Files Modified
- `apps/api/src/channels/channels.module.ts` - Added TikTokAdapter + SyncLogCleanupService as providers, registered TikTok adapter in onModuleInit()

## Task Status
- T-012, T-013, T-018, T-021: Verified already complete by backend-core
- T-014: TikTokAdapter OAuth - DONE
- T-015: TikTokAdapter token refresh + fetchOrders - DONE
- T-016: TikTok order mapping (via TikTokAdapter.mapRawOrder + OrderMapperService.mapOrder) - DONE
- T-017: SyncExecutor TikTok integration + ChannelsModule registration - DONE
- T-022: SyncLogCleanupService - DONE

Note: The 2 pre-existing test failures (aov-by-channel.integration, reseller-performance.integration) are unrelated — they require DATABASE_URL which is not set in this environment.
